name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents, covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering workflows for planning, building, testing, reviewing, and shipping code
interface.longDescription: Agent Skills packages production-grade software engineering workflows as Codex skills. Use it to guide agents through idea refinement, specifications, planning, incremental implementation, test-driven development, debugging, code review, simplification, documentation, security, performance, automation, migrations, and shipping.
defaultPrompt: Use agent skills to plan this change.
Review this work before I ship it.
Help me debug this failure systematically.
